goals: Design a host strain roadmap for naringenin in Saccharomyces cerevisiae
Sequence edits from highest-leverage bottlenecks to lower-leverage polish work
Preserve experimental learnings in a reusable hypothesis queue

project_context.project_goal: Identify literature for improving naringenin production in engineered yeast.
project_context.focus_area: Pathway design, host engineering, and bottleneck prioritization
starter_questions: Which pathway bottlenecks are most likely to cap naringenin titers in Saccharomyces cerevisiae?
What genetic interventions should be prioritized before optimizing fermentation conditions?
